name: linkraft
description: Open-source MCP toolkit for Claude Code. Curated, tested integrations for popular services.
author: Akella inMotion

packs.name: telegram
packs.description: Telegram Bot API: send messages, manage groups, inline keyboards, webhooks

packs.name: discord
packs.description: Discord Bot API: messages, channels, guilds, member management

packs.name: twitter-x
packs.description: Twitter/X API v2: tweets, users, likes, retweets, bookmarks

packs.name: instagram
packs.description: Instagram Graph API: media, comments, insights

packs.name: gmail
packs.description: Gmail API: send, read, label, and manage email threads

packs.name: slack
packs.description: Slack API: messages, channels, reactions, pins

packs.name: google-calendar
packs.description: Google Calendar API: events, calendars, quick add

packs.name: google-sheets
packs.description: Google Sheets API: read, write, append, and manage spreadsheets
